commands.name: sync
commands.short: Sync API data to local SQLite for offline search and analysis

flags.name: global-param
flags.usage: Extra query param to inject into every sync request including dependent path-scoped calls (repeatable, key=value). Use when an API requires a scope on every call regardless of path nesting.

flags.name: latest-only
flags.usage: Refresh head of each resource only; clears resume cursor and caps pages at 1. Mutually exclusive with --since (--since wins).

flags.name: max-pages
flags.usage: Maximum pages to fetch per resource (0 = unlimited; cap-hit emits a sync_warning event)

flags.name: param
flags.usage: Extra query param to inject into flat-list sync requests (repeatable, key=value). Skipped on path-scoped dependent requests so a top-level scope like workspace=<id> does not double up on /parents/<id>/children calls. Use --global-param to inject everywhere. Avoid pagination keys (limit/since/cursor) — overriding them corrupts resume state.

flags.name: resource-param
flags.usage: Per-resource extra query param (repeatable, resource:key=value). Wins over --param and --global-param when keys conflict.

flags.name: resources
flags.usage: Comma-separated resource types to sync. Naming a parent also runs its parent-keyed dependents (see Long help for scoping).

flags.name: strict
flags.usage: Exit non-zero on any per-resource failure (default: only critical failures or all-resource failure exit non-zero).
